transcript.text:
(Can't believe it...)
World class
World class
It's world class, right?
(Today's event to confirm world class) Should we give her a round of applause?
(Daechang)
(But how many kg...?)
(4kg of daechang that makes your heart race..!)
(How will you eat all of that..?)
(All this daechang...)
(She does it again)
I thought it was a lie
'Is it a new type of scam..?'
(Today's location, Yeonnam-dong)
Hello everyone
Today,

I'm in Yeonnam-dong
I came to
(Daechang mukbang!) eat daechang
(3kg daechang mukbang at home that failed...) I did a daechang mukbang at home last time and everything got burnt...
(Daechang mukbang from March 16th where I got scolded by subscribers)
(There will be no failure) I came here to eat it right this time
They sell daechang and gopchang here
(Known as a good restaurant in Yeonnam-dong) They had great reviews, so I had to check it out
Go go
('Daeseung Gopchang' located at Yeontral Park)
(Entered the restaurant) Hello
I'm inside now
(Feels like I rented out this place haha) They just opened so I'm the only one here
(Various dishes such as gopchang, daechang, makchang, etc.) There's the menu!
I want some gopchang
but I'm here to eat daechang

(It's you today!) so I'll just order daechang
Can you serve them in long pieces?
Yes, we can do that
- Oh really? - Yes!
Then
- 4kg! - All right
(4kg of daechang that's hard to serve...)
(While it's being grilled...)
(Stew is here) It's stew! Thank you
(Comes with this soft tofu stew!) There's gopchang in it
Like this
(Plop) Mash the soft tofu
I thought it was a lie (that Tzuyang was coming)
(YouTuber impersonation) 'Is it a new type of scam?!?'
(Feels like a phone prank with a big order...) Like ordering 40 fried chickens with no show
- Green plum juice! - Oh really?!

(Prepared it even though it was suspicious... Haha)
Whoa, it's boiling already!
It looks amazing
(Soju is calling me...!) This calls for soju
It's tasty!
(Plum juice) Wow, this is perfect for soju
This is no joke
Wow... How is this complimentary?
(This is free too) The cup haha
(A pitcher glass to match her level haha) Gotta drink like this
Thank you
(Mistake)
Waiting for food is the hardest
so I love it
when
there are appetizers like this

(While I start off with the stew...)
(4kg of daechang is ready...!)
(Daechang is here)
(A huge amount that makes you laugh...) Thank you
(In disbelief) How will you eat all of that?
It's not as much as I....
expected!
(Is this for real?) Really?
(Daechang is usually fully cooked in the kitchen)
- If it's too greasy, we'll do it for you in the kitchen - Oh, only the outside is cooked?
Yes!
(Recalling the daechang live nightmare...) I did a dachang mukbang at home before
Yes, I watched that!
I watched it!
(Wasn't it a kimbap mukbang...?)
(Burnt) (A new kind of oil kimbap mukbang)

- You have to cut it and cook it all the way to get that flavor - Is that how you make it delicious?
(Just say the word and I'll show you) I'll show you how it's really done...
(Self) Then, I'll grill this one
Can you
take care of the other half?
Yes, of course
(I'll show you how the pros do it) We will serve it how it's usually served
Isn't it hot?!
(Owner specialty: doesn't know how hot it is) Because I'm an expert...
Thank you
(I will succeed this time...) I won't make it into kimbap this time
(Plump daechang)
(I can't make an oil kimbap video part 2) It almost became kimbap again
I won't let that happen!
(Explode)
Wow..

(Hm...)
Ahh, kimbap
I'm in trouble
(Some became kimbap...)
(They're being grilled deliciously)
(Very fresh...)
Kimbap :)
(Oil kimbap part 2....) I'm in trouble
I'll turn it off...
(Oh no...)
(Owner specialty #2: Excellent service) You're doing great
Is this okay?
(While Tzuyang is struggling...)
(The owner's daechang is cooking nicely!)
(Daechang is served)
(The difference)

(Today's lesson: Eat whatever they give you) It looks delicious.
About 20-23 servings...?
- (She's gonna eat it all...?) - I'll be honored
if you finish it all
I'll turn the heat down
And eat this first
Oh this...
What is this?
Oh my
(Accidently pulled it out...)
- Bon appétit - Yes, enjoy
(Full of savory taste)
Looks great
Bon appétit
It's nice and golden brown
First bite!

It's so savory...!
It's so savory and delicious
Is it seasoned?
It smells so good
- (Looks delicious) - I'll mix the sauce
This is their special sauce!
It's all
grease inside
Greasy and flavorful!
Bad daechang
smells bad and the outside
is rubbery
This one is nice and chewy
Daechang
with green onion kimchi
(Shiny)

If...
I eat all of this,
will I have 4kg of grease in my body?
Wow, there's
a bit of grease on the bottom
(Green onion kimchi grilled in oil.. Amazing) I think green onion kimchi will be really good if it's cooked. I'll try it
Whoa
It's better grilled
The green onion is sweet
(Goes well with the oil) It's so tasty, the green onion goes so well with it
(Now it's time for Tzuyang's daechang...!) Should I try one that I grilled?
(Kimbap)
I'll get a good one
(Really?) It's delicious...!
The one I grilled
(Truth) is a bit tough!

They gave me
caper and wasabi
Will wasabi make it less greasy?
Wow, that's so good!
Why haven't I had wasabi and daechang together before?
Wasabi goes well
with greasy foods
And daechang is the most greasy
This much
A little more?
This should be okay
Wow, the oil!!
This goes so well together
(Placing bread to make it less greasy)
The bread
is soaking up the grease

It's less greasy now
and it tastes better...
I think it got more savory
(Bowl full of daechang)
(Stew refill)
Thank you
(Tzuyang can't keep up with the owner's daechang...) The one they made for me is way better
(Owner chance) I should have him to take this too
How is it?
This tastes so much better!
(How to grill daechang deliciously) (Remove the oil as much as possible to make it savory!)
(Show us your skills!) Please make it as savory as possible
(Gopchang guy is on the move) It would've been nice
It would've been nice
if I got it cooked from the beginning
(Mukbang is all about how it looks... haha) Since it's a mukbang, I like to eat the whole thing

(※ Make sure to cook daechang all the way) I heard that you can't eat daechang as a whole because it won't be cooked inside
This soup...
is amazing
A daechang stew here
would be nice too
(Daechang) Put some pieces here
The soup is really refreshing so I think it'll go well together
(Upgraded)
(Thanks to him, daechang gained a new life..!)
Wow, it's cooked
really well
I'll give it a try
Wow, it's so flavorful...!
This place is great because
if this isn't prepared correctly, it's so easy for it to smell or taste bad
but it doesn't smell at all

(Placing bread)
I didn't like daechang when it's cooked to the crisp
but I know why people like it like that
(The greasiness goes away, and the unique flavor goes up) These crispy ones are very savory too
(Wants to cook stew on one side) I want to have the stew on this side
(Moving them over)
Can I get more broth?
- (Of course) - Thank you
(Some more seasoning...!)
I have a plan
I'm going to make daechang stew
(Swoosh) I'll add these in
(Tzuyang's daechang stew)
Amazing
Since it's a daechang stew,
I'll add more

(A lot)
I'll eat the ones that are nicely cooked
Daechang soft tofu stew!
Oh, it's so delicious
It's even better
with some grease
Since daechang costs $18.30,
(New dish daechang soft tofu stew) I'll make it $16.80
(We made it for you!)
Wrapped with green onion kimchi
It's crispy outside, soft inside
So savory!!
Wow....
I've never seen anyone eat like this
(First time seeing this....)
How will the daechang in the stew taste?

Ah hot
(So touched by the taste haha) So delicious
Wow, this...
Daechang and soft tofu together like this
This is really hot
Delicious...!
It's soft and chewy
It feels like the daechang was marinated
It's less greasy
(Like an old man)
(Late news) You invented a new dish?
No, that's not it
I just put some daechang in the stew and it's really good
(I still can't believe it's part of the order...) You don't sell the stew separately? It's just complimentary..?
(Becoming kimbap) It's all burnt
Get a big piece of soft tofu

and some soup....
(So into the stew)
(So touched by the soft tofu stew haha) The soup is so delicious..
We're actually known for our stew... Haha
(Adding everything except the kimbap ones)
Last daechang stew!
I should eat these too
Wow, I'm not full
but I feel like
I'm full of oil
It just feels like it
It's hard to explain
Green onion kimchi would be good in the stew too
Or is that a little too much?
(Yes...)
It has a deep flavor

(Eventually the kimbap goes into the stew.. Haha) I'll add these too
It's so delicious
(Looks like the devil's stew...)
(Getting all the last bits of daechang...)
When I was so into gopchang stew,
I ordered it from
so many places
(The taste that would make me settle down..) I would've stuck with this place if I knew back then
(The stew makes you crave fried rice) You usually make fried rice on the grill
but I think it'll be good in the stew too
(Finished)
Wow....
(This is) World class...
How did you...?
Have you seen anyone eat this much?
(Nope)

Guys, she finished everything!
World class, right?
(Like a university president haha) Should we give her a round of applause?
It's hard to eat even 500g of daechang...
I finished it because it was so delicious haha
Thank you haha
$347.60...
I would've had more if it was gopchang
(I would be broke if it was gopchang) but I came to eat daechang
I'll come back next time for gopchang
I enjoyed eating today
